register.note: New hero is a full-width composed portrait in the sanctioned panel with mono figcaption and reads as a fit-line-through-points at 160px; corner-to-corner line leaves some empty panel area so it clears 3, not 4.

The hero draws each point's miss as a vertical error-hued residual stem with one called out 'error = distance', teaching residual-as-distance like Seeing-Theory's squares; the non-called-out stems are faint, so it clears 3 not 4.
See-it carries in-graphic labels (mono caption, axis labels) and tinted prose terms bound to the marks, matching Distill's labelled-figure signaling.
Distill-soft surfaces, restrained chrome; the opening dead air is gone (opens on the full hero). See-it beat 01 still floats some empty left-column below short prose — caps at 3.
From statics the motions read purposeful and learner-driven — hero line eases up and stems grow in once, Run-it drag prediction, Break-it stepped failure loop — transitional not decorative.
Semantic grammar holds lab-wide — prediction blue, truth amber, error crimson — and Break-it recolours out-of-band points to error-hue without an all-red field, AA-darkened ink in prose.

hero.note: Hero is strong; to reach exemplar grade, all residual stems at consistent error weight and a tighter composition so the empty panel area shrinks.

assessment.note: Transfer item 05 is an open write-your-own textarea with 'Commit & reveal model answer', not an MCQ.

verdict.summary: New hero makes the regression mechanism the protagonist and resolves the opening dead air; clears register 3 with two non-blocking polish items (See-it beat-01 left-column void; under-weighted residual stems).
